note: Manually-maintained SecOps posture register. Feeds Labwatch SecOps panel. Update statuses here when actions are completed.

pending_rotations.label: GitHub CLI OAuth token (master5d)
pending_rotations.why: Leaked to stdout 2026-05-30 (env-var dup of keyring token)
pending_rotations.action: github.com/settings/applications → Authorized OAuth Apps → GitHub CLI → Revoke, then `gh auth login`

pending_rotations.label: CrowdSec LAPI bouncer key
pending_rotations.why: Was hardcoded in cloudflare-bouncer.yaml until 2026-06-11 (never in git)
pending_rotations.action: `cscli bouncers add` on (re)deploy of the stack

infra_stack.note: Never deployed; Docker absent locally. Pre-deploy code fixes done 2026-06-11 (wazuh config dupe, retaliation input validation); regenerate LAPI key via cscli on deploy.

deploy_targets.label: AppArmor MAC profiles
deploy_targets.what: Mandatory access control for agent/container processes on the Hetzner node (confine docker, n8n, agent runtimes)
deploy_targets.how: aa-status → profile per service in enforce mode; docker --security-opt apparmor=<profile>

deploy_targets.label: Falco runtime detection
deploy_targets.what: eBPF runtime alerts incl. custom rules (prompt-injection patterns in n8n/qdrant logs, vault tampering) → Falcosidekick → n8n/Telegram

deploy_targets.label: Wazuh FIM (file integrity monitoring)
deploy_targets.what: 24/7 FIM on configs, vault dirs, agent configs; SIEM correlation
deploy_targets.how: infra/wazuh/deploy_wazuh.sh (fix WSL path first); enable syscheck on /root/sovern + /etc

accepted_risks: read_only:true not set on crowdsec/bouncer containers (write to volumes) — revisit with tmpfs at deploy
infra/.env holds live secrets on disk — gitignored + read-denied; migrate to vault on Bitwarden revival
